commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6f90acd4df388b7476dac9aa8c1155de9d3d3e9f)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds `model_failover` and `model_failure_terminal` Plugin SDK hooks, wires them into embedded failover and terminal auto-reply failure paths, updates docs/generated baselines, and adds regression tests.

PR surface: Source +236, Tests +568, Docs +19, Generated 0. Total +823 across 22 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction for the remaining defect: queued follow-up runs call the same fallback orchestrator but do not pass the selected next candidate into `runEmbeddedAgent`. I did not execute the queued-follow-up scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is one concrete, mechanical branch repair: carry next-candidate fallback context through the queued follow-up runner and cover it with a focused regression test.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
